---
title: "Descriptive Analysis of the Marijuana Prices Dataset"
author: "Alejandro Romero González"
affiliation: "Banco de México"
date: "21/02/2026"
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
```

First, we load the clean dataset:
```{r}
CleanData <- read_parquet(here("Data", "Marijuana_Prices_in_Mexico_clean.parquet"))
```

# Tables for paper
```{r}
summ_vec_std <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  c(
    Mean = mean(x),
    Median = median(x),
    SD   = sd(x),
    Min  = min(x),
    Max  = max(x)
  )
}

make_table_std <- function(df) {
  out <- rbind(
    "Price (MXN per gram)" = summ_vec_std(df$price_mxn_g),
    "Quantity (grams)"    = summ_vec_std(df$quantity_g),
    "Value (MXN)"         = summ_vec_std(df$value_mxn),
    "Age"                 = summ_vec_std(df$age)
  )
  as.data.frame(out)
}

tab_overall <- make_table_std(CleanData)
tab_bad  <- make_table_std(filter(CleanData, quality == "bad"))
tab_good <- make_table_std(filter(CleanData, quality == "good"))

print(round(tab_overall, 2))
print(round(tab_good, 2))
print(round(tab_bad, 2))

fmt_num <- function(x, digits = 2) {
  formatC(x, format = "f", digits = digits, big.mark = ",")
}

panel_lines <- function(df, panel_label) {
  stats <- make_table_std(df)
  c(
    paste0("\\multicolumn{6}{l}{\\textit{", panel_label, "}} \\\\[3pt]"),
    paste0("Price (MXN per gram)   & ", fmt_num(stats["Price (MXN per gram)", "Mean"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Price (MXN per gram)", "Median"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Price (MXN per gram)", "SD"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Price (MXN per gram)", "Min"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Price (MXN per gram)", "Max"]), " \\\\"),
    paste0("Quantity (grams)       & ", fmt_num(stats["Quantity (grams)", "Mean"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Quantity (grams)", "Median"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Quantity (grams)", "SD"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Quantity (grams)", "Min"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Quantity (grams)", "Max"]), " \\\\"),
    paste0("Transaction value (MXN)& ", fmt_num(stats["Value (MXN)", "Mean"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Value (MXN)", "Median"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Value (MXN)", "SD"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Value (MXN)", "Min"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Value (MXN)", "Max"]), " \\\\"),
    paste0("Age (years)            & ", fmt_num(stats["Age", "Mean"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Age", "Median"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Age", "SD"]),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Age", "Min"], 0),
           " & ", fmt_num(stats["Age", "Max"], 0), " \\\\")
  )
}

output_dir <- here("LaTeX", "tables")
dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

table_lines <- c(
  "\\begin{table}[H]",
  "\\centering",
  "\\caption{Descriptive statistics}",
  "\\label{tab:descriptive}",
  "\\begin{threeparttable}",
  "\\begin{tabular}{lrrrrr}",
  "\\toprule",
  " & Mean & Median & SD & Min & Max \\\\",
  "\\midrule",
  panel_lines(CleanData, paste0("Panel A: Full sample (N = ", format(nrow(CleanData), big.mark = ","), ")")),
  "\\\\[6pt]",
  panel_lines(filter(CleanData, quality == "good"),
              paste0("Panel B: Good quality (seedless) (N = ",
                     format(sum(CleanData$quality == "good"), big.mark = ","), ")")),
  "\\\\[6pt]",
  panel_lines(filter(CleanData, quality == "bad"),
              paste0("Panel C: Bad quality (seeded) (N = ",
                     format(sum(CleanData$quality == "bad"), big.mark = ","), ")")),
  "\\bottomrule",
  "\\end{tabular}",
  "\\begin{tablenotes}[flushleft]\\small",
  "\\item \\textit{Notes:} Price per gram is computed as transaction value divided by quantity purchased.  Quality classification is self-reported: ``good'' denotes seedless marijuana and ``bad'' denotes seeded marijuana.",
  "\\end{tablenotes}",
  "\\end{threeparttable}",
  "\\end{table}"
)

writeLines(table_lines, file.path(output_dir, "table_descriptive.tex"), useBytes = TRUE)
```
